title: Andrews's Flooding Rate Notebook
description: Thomas Andrews's open notebook on the chart table of the Bridge contains a column of figures in pencil: compartment-by-compartment flooding rates measured by his engineers since 11:50 PM, with a final calculation at the bottom circled twice — '1h 45m from 00:00. Possibly less. Hull stress unknown.' The calculation proves the ship will founder by 1:45 AM, forty minutes earlier than the estimate given to the officers loading boats — and it is signed with Andrews's initials.
